member.summary: Input query DTO used to retrieve cash ledger transactions.

member.summary: Enumerates the cash account status in a cash ledger transaction entry.

member.summary: Output DTO for a cash account with totals.

member.summary: Output DTO used to retrieve cash ledger entries with transaction information.

member.summary: Input fields used to update cash ledger transaction entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashTransactionDescriptor
member.summary: Output DTO used to retrieve cash ledger transactions for use in lists.

member.name: T:Empiria.Financial.Adapters.RecordsSearchQuery
member.summary: Input query DTO used to search cash flow related data and entities.

member.summary: Interface with credit account data coming from external systems.

member.summary: Interface used to retrieve credit accounts data from external systems.

member.summary: Interface for a credit account entry used to connect with external systems.

member.summary: Interface with credit data coming from external systems.
